001package net.pl3x.guithium.api;
002
003import net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.texture.TextureManager;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.NetworkHandler;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.player.PlayerManager;
006import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008import org.slf4j.Logger;
009import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
010
011/**
012 * The Guithium API.
013 */
014public interface Guithium {
015    /**
016     * The identifier for this mod.
017     */
018    String MOD_ID = "guithium";
019
020    /**
021     * The protocol version.
022     * <p>
023     * This is used to ensure client and server can correctly talk to each other.
024     */
025    int PROTOCOL = 1;
026
027    /**
028     * bStats ID number for Guithium.
029     */
030    int BSTATS_ID = 25813;
031
032    /**
033     * Guithium's internal logger.
034     * <p>
035     * <u>For internal use</u>. Please use your own logger.
036     */
037    Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(StringUtils.capitalize(Guithium.MOD_ID));
038
039    /**
040     * Get the Guithium API instance.
041     *
042     * @return Instance of Guithium API
043     */
044    @NotNull
045    static Guithium api() {
046        return Provider.api();
047    }
048
049    /**
050     * Get the network handler instance.
051     *
052     * @return Network handler
053     */
054    @NotNull
055    NetworkHandler getNetworkHandler();
056
057    /**
058     * Get the player manager instance.
059     *
060     * @return Player manager
061     */
062    @NotNull
063    PlayerManager getPlayerManager();
064
065    /**
066     * Get the texture manager instance.
067     *
068     * @return Texture manager
069     */
070    @NotNull
071    TextureManager getTextureManager();
072
073    /**
074     * The Guithium instance provider.
075     * <p>
076     * <u>For internal use</u>.
077     */
078    final class Provider {
079        static Guithium api;
080
081        private Provider() {
082            // Empty constructor to pacify javadoc lint
083        }
084
085        @NotNull
086        private static Guithium api() {
087            return Provider.api;
088        }
089    }
090}
